## Observations
- Repository appears to be a full-stack TypeScript/React frontend plus Node/Express backend.
- SQL setup files suggest Supabase/Postgres-backed persistence and feature migration scripts.
- Documentation coverage is strong for migrations, setup, and feature-specific guides.
